# Your Trash Day Team

> Your Trash Day Team is a combined trash-bin service in the Charleston, South Carolina area, offered together by two established local companies: Trash Day Made Easy (weekly bin roll-out and roll-in valet) and The Bin Boy (monthly bin washing). One flat price covers both services.

## What the service includes
- Weekly bin roll-out and roll-in, handled by Trash Day Made Easy: bins are pulled to the curb before pickup and returned after collection.
- Monthly bin washing, handled by The Bin Boy: bins are cleaned with high-pressure hot water (around 200°) using a biodegradable, non-toxic solution.
- Available for residential homeowners and renters, businesses, and property management companies (multiple properties supported).

## Pricing
- $70 per month per property, covering both the weekly valet and the monthly wash.
- No charge at signup; the card is stored securely with Stripe and billed on the 1st of each month after the account is approved.
- No long-term contract; pause or cancel anytime.

## Service area
- Charleston, SC and surrounding Lowcountry communities, including North Charleston, West Ashley, Mount Pleasant, Summerville, James Island, and Daniel Island.

## Key pages
- Home and signup: https://yourtrashdayteam.com/
- FAQ: https://yourtrashdayteam.com/faq/
- Blog (trash-day tips and bin care): https://yourtrashdayteam.com/blog/
- Reviews: https://yourtrashdayteam.com/reviews/

## Contact
- Phone: 843-955-3132

- Trash Day Made Easy — bin valet (roll-out/roll-in): https://www.trashdaymadeeasy.com/
- The Bin Boy — bin washing: https://www.thebinboy.com/
